Four free tools that turn your costs, customers, and goals into a pricing plan that actually works. Built by an indie maker for indie makers.

◎ Stripe Payment Link Generator

Generate Stripe payment links and code snippets. No account needed for the generator.

Payment Link HTML

<a href="https://buy.stripe.com/YOUR_LINK"
   class="your-button-class">
  Get Pro Plan — $29/month
</a>

Stripe.js Checkout Code

import { loadStripe } from '@stripe/stripe-js';

const stripe = await loadStripe('pk_live_YOUR_KEY');
await stripe.redirectToCheckout({
  lineItems: [{
    price: 'price_XXXXXXXX',
    quantity: 1,
  }],
  mode: 'subscription',
  successUrl: 'https://yoursite.com/success',
  cancelUrl: 'https://yoursite.com/cancel',
});

Ready to accept payments?

Create a Stripe account, generate a real payment link from your dashboard, and paste it into the HTML template above. The code snippets are ready to use with your own Stripe keys.

How It Works

Three minutes. Four tools. One pricing plan.

1

Enter Your Numbers

Monthly costs, customer count, growth goals. Whatever you know, plug it in. The math handles the rest.

2

See the Results

Every change updates instantly. Play with conversion rates, churn, and pricing until it feels right.

3

Ship With Confidence

Copy the Stripe code. Set up your payment page. Launch knowing your unit economics work.

Ready to stop guessing?

Free forever. Built by an indie maker who got tired of spreadsheets.

Calculate Your Price Now Set up Stripe →

When you're ready to accept payments, Stripe takes 5 minutes to set up. We earn a small commission if you sign up through our link.
